title: Kuwait Air Force aircraft spotted at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The Kuwait Air Force is the latest military aircraft to be spotted at Prestwick Airport.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: A Boeing C-17A Globemaster III from the Middle East country departed South Ayrshire (Image: Martin Clarke) This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: A Boeing C-17A Globemaster III from the Middle East country departed South Ayrshire for Dover Air Force Base in the US on Monday, March 9. The aircraft, in a distinctive livery featuring the colours of the Kuwait flag, was delivered to the air force in September 2010.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Kuwait Air Force is latest military aircraft spotted at Prestwick Airport
